title: RelBench rel-amazon Dataset: Download, Extract, and Prepare for PRMP Diagnostic
summary: Demo notebook for the Amazon Video Games relational dataset prepared for PRMP cross-table predictability diagnostic. Loads pre-processed data (50K reviews, 3.4K products, 10.9K customers) with 21 encoded features and 2 FK links. Explores relational schema, FK cardinality statistics, inspects example records, extracts aligned parent-child feature matrices, computes R² cross-table predictability via linear regression, and visualizes per-feature R² scores for product→review and customer→review links. Uses curated mini_demo_data.json (3 examples, 50 aligned samples) loaded from GitHub URL with local fallback.
